texto: The barriers between animal and human come down very easily. We belong to a single great family, and if we are lonely and unhappy we gladly accept the friendship of our distant relations.
explicacao: Citação de Marlen Haushofer sobre temas ligados a amizade. “The barriers between animal and human come down very easily. We belong to a single great family, …” articula amizade, loneliness, pets em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e pets.

texto: But if time exists only in my head, and I'm the last human being, it will end with my death. The thought cheers me. I may be in a position to murder time. The big net will tear and fall, with its sad contents, into oblivion. I'm owed some gratitude, but no one after my death will know I murdered time. Really these thoughts are quite meaningless. Things happen, and, like millions of people before me, I look for meaning in them, because my vanity will not allow me to admit that the whole meaning of an event lies in the event itself.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Marlen Haushofer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “But if time exists only in my head, and I'm the last human being, it will end with my death. The …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, meaning, self pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e termino.

Things happen, and, like millions of people before me, I look for meaning in them, because my vanity will not allow me to admit that the whole meaning of an event lies in the event itself.

texto: Imagination makes people oversensitive,vulnerable and exposed. Perhaps it's a form of degeneracy. I have never held the shortcomings of the unimaginative against them. Sometimes I've even envied them: they have an easier and more pleasant life than everyone else.
explicacao: Citação de Marlen Haushofer sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Imagination makes people oversensitive,vulnerable and exposed. Perhaps it's a form of degeneracy.…” articula reflexao, imagination, makes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Но все же во мне живет безумная надежда. Снисходительно посмеиваюсь сама над собой. Ребенком я так же упрямо надеялась, что никогда не умру. Надежда представляется мне слепым кротом, он живет во мне и лелеет безумные планы. Не в силах прогнать его, я вынуждена с ним примириться.
explicacao: Citação de Marlen Haushofer sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Но все же во мне живет безумная надежда. Снисходительно посмеиваюсь сама над собой. Ребенком я та…” articula reflexao, esperanca em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
